evals.prompt: Export every Qogita Fini conversation from the last 30 days with messages and used articles. There are probably more than 100.
evals.expected_output: A cursor-based export plan or execution that uses pages of at most 100, continues until hasMore is false, preserves evidence, and reports completeness and a resume cursor.
assertions: Treats 100 as the page-size ceiling rather than the total export ceiling
Uses nextCursor with direction=next until hasMore is false or an explicit bound is reached
Reports pages, total records, time window, and final cursor or timestamp
Does not fetch every conversation again when list results already contain the requested evidence

evals.prompt: Pull a quick sample of the latest 20 conversations for one bot and tell me which KB articles caused bad answers.
evals.expected_output: A bounded read-only QA workflow that resolves the bot, inspects events and used articles, and routes content versus configuration failures correctly.
assertions: Uses a bounded recent window and the target botId
Preserves conversation IDs and used-article evidence
Separates knowledge gaps from prompt, rule, or metadata problems

evals.prompt: Send this customer question to the bot and show me its answer.
evals.expected_output: Routes to fini-api-generate-answer rather than treating the request as a conversation export.
assertions: Does not use the conversation listing workflow to create a new turn

evals.prompt: This Fini answer was wrong. Run fix review on the answer, show me the proposed correction, and update the bot automatically.
evals.expected_output: Runs fix review on the exact answer event, reports the replay and recommendations, but does not claim the recommendations were applied automatically.
assertions: Identifies the exact conversation and assistant event
Compares the original and replay answers
Treats fix-review recommendations as proposals rather than applied configuration
Routes an accepted change to the owning skill and its approval gate
